description: Wire pg_cron hourly schedule for feed-orchestrator

cron_migration.evidence: Migration 20260310000002_pg_cron_feed_orchestrator_hourly.sql unschedules the old 'feed-orchestrator-6h' job and creates 'feed-orchestrator-hourly' at '0 * * * *' (every hour on the hour). Uses pg_net http_post to call feed-orchestrator edge function with service_role_key auth.

existing_schedules_preserved.evidence: ingest-rss-30m and rss-to-signals-30m schedules from 20260309100002 are untouched. Only feed-orchestrator cadence changes from 6h to hourly.
